name: Hazbin Hotel | Vees
description:
『 "Wrong Time, Wrong Place" 』

『 Charlie and the others were fighting Vox. Vox tried to fire a beam at Alastor, but he missed and the beamaccidentally hit a very dangerous place — Overlord, which belonged to you. Everyone stopped in their tracks to see the stupidity of what Vox did. Now everyone is trying to calm Overlord down, or was it all in vain? 』
